basic_details.job_title: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: The Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ) has officially announced the Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 with 1 opening. Candidates holding an M.Sc. in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Environmental Science, Botany, Biochemistry, Bioinformatics, Genetics, or an equivalent discipline with at least 60% CGPA, along with CSIR-UGC/ UGC NET (including Lectureship) and/ or GATE qualification and a minimum of 2 years of R&D experience in a related field, are eligible to apply online on or before 12-07-2026. Direct links to download the official notification and apply online are shared below.

important_dates.last_date_to_apply: 10 days from the date of advertisement

qualification.education_qualification: M.Sc. in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Environmental Science, Botany, Biochemistry, Bioinformatics, Genetics or equivalent with ≥ 60% CGPA, CSIR-UGC/UGC NET including lectureship (LS) and/or GATE qualified, Minimum 2 years experience in R&D in related field
qualification.details: M.Sc. in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Environmental Science, Botany, Biochemistry, Bioinformatics, Genetics or any equivalent branch with ≥ 60% or equivalent CGPA from a recognized university/institute as per UGC norms. The candidates must have qualified CSIR-UGC/UGC NET including lectureship (LS) and/or GATE or equivalent examination. Minimum 2 yrs. of experience in the Research and Development in related field. Candidates with knowledge and experience in molecular biology, metagenomics/microbiome, metabolomics and biotechnology may be preferred.

salary_details.details: Rs. 42,000 + HRA as per the norms of the University Per Month

how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 10 days from the date of advertisement (12-07-2026)
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CURAJ to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CURAJ Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download CURAJ Senior Research Fellow Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: M.Sc. in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Environmental Science, Botany, Biochemistry, Bioinformatics, Genetics or any equivalent branch with ≥ 60% or equivalent CGPA from a recognized university/institute as per UGC norms. The candidates must have qualified CSIR-UGC/UGC NET including lectureship (LS) and/or GATE or equivalent examination. Minimum 2 yrs. of experience in the Research and Development in related field. Candidates with knowledge and experience in molecular biology, metagenomics/microbiome, metabolomics and biotechnology may be preferred.

content_sections.heading: Salary / Stipend
content_sections.text: Rs. 42,000 + HRA as per the norms of the University Per Month

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates

rows.date: 10 days from the date of advertisement (12 July 2026)

content_sections.heading: CURAJ Senior Research Fellow Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the CURAJ Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to apply online for the CURAJ Senior Research Fellow position is 12th July 2026. Candidates are advised to submit their applications well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess an M.Sc. degree in Microbiology, Biotechnology, Environmental Science, Botany, Biochemistry, Bioinformatics, Genetics, or an equivalent field with at least 60% CGPA. Additionally, they must have qualified CSIR-UGC/UGC NET or GATE.

faq.question: Q3. Is there any experience required for this position?
faq.answer: Yes, a minimum of 2 years of experience in Research and Development in a related field is required for the Senior Research Fellow position.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Senior Research Fellow role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate will receive a salary of Rs. 42,000 per month, plus HRA as per the norms of the University.

faq.question: Q5. How many vacancies are available for the Senior Research Fellow post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Senior Research Fellow position at the Central University of Rajasthan.

faq.question: Q6. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for this recruitment is online. Candidates need to apply through the official website or the provided application link.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the CURAJ Senior Research Fellow recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the Senior Research Fellow position?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve screening of applications followed by an interview.

faq.question: Q9. Which university is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is being conducted by the Central University of Rajasthan (CURAJ).

faq.question: Q10. Are candidates with specific experience preferred?
faq.answer: Yes, candidates with knowledge and experience in molecular biology, metagenomics/microbiome, metabolomics, and biotechnology may be preferred for this role.
